title: JVL Plastic Hanging Peg Basket, Clear/Aqua, One Size, 19-216
features: Spacious peg basket/caddy holds up to approx. 100 standard sized pegs
The basket boasts a convenient hook that hangs from washing line while you peg out your clothes
Made from durable plastic and its lightweight even when full so it’s easy to move around
Features holes so any excess water can drain out should you forget to take your pegs indoors and allows the air to circulate through
Size: H:13 x W:23 x D:15.5cm approx.
